'^IT.'^.'p!. 5 9 7 (3 7 ), cTlfte 20 5 m ^ , I [ m 9/1/2000--^.^.-?ft.] 3TR. ■?fl'. ■p7?TT, MINISTRY OF INFORMATION AND BROAD CASTING NOTIFICATION New Delhi. tl\e 13th September. 2000 G.S.R. 719(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and sub-section (2) of section 22 of the Cable Television Networks (Regulation) Act. 1995 (7 of 1995). the Central Government hereby rescinds the notification of the Ministry' of Information and Broadcasting bearing G.S.R. 597(E) dated 20th August, 1999 with immediate effect.
